CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2006 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2006 Continued To Sep-15-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-18-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rita Howell, Bailiff: A. Cruz.
Gino Mazzanti, Esq. for Plaintiff: Eric Freed, present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Gassam Awadala and Lachen Chnaf as follows:
General Damages $125,000.00
Med. Expenses $4,715.00
Lost Income $28,000.00
Property Damages $2,420.00, (sub total $160,135.00)
Costs $1,015.00, for a Total of $161,150.00
Costs $320.00, for a total of $
Judgment signed in open court.
